name: Amaretti Cookies # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until frothy.
2. Slowly add sugar and salt to the egg whites. Beat until quite thick.
3. Fold in almonds and almond extract.
4. Drop by teaspoon onto a buttered and floured cookie sheet.
5. Let sit for 2 hours.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until pale brown (about 12 minutes).
